messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-616 — What triggers ModelFactory `assign`? — human ruling on autonomous cold-apply (restarts the swarm)
Approval context: BL-563 wires a Factory assignment into the launch path but deliberately leaves the trigger as-is: a human running the CLI. This ticket is the parked fork on what should INVOKE `assign`, split out because the options have materially different blast radii and the choice must not be made in-swarm. Opt…
BL-616 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-616" (or "reject BL-616 <reason>") to act.
